system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.dqt_tonghop_donhang_get3","body":"CREATE   PROC [dbo].[DQT_TONGHOP_DONHANG_GET3] (@maddh NVARCHAR (max))
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT A.maddh,
		   IIF(LEN(F.tensp_vn) > 0, F.tensp_vn, F.tensp) as tensp,
		   A.chitiet AS mahtr,
		   b.chitiet,
		   B.nguyenlieu,
		   CASE WHEN B.chitiet_ghep2 = 1 THEN N'CHI TIẾT GHÉP' ELSE N'CHI TIẾT ĂN NGAY' END chitiet_ghep2,
		   B.dayy_tc,
		   B.rong_tc,
		   B.dai_tc,
		   b.soluong_tc,
		   A.soluong * B.soluong_tc AS soluong,
		   m3_tc = (B.dayy_tc * B.rong_tc * B.dai_tc * A.soluong * B.soluong_tc)/ 1000000000,
		   b.ghichu, 
		   B.veneer_canhngan, B.veneer_canhdai,
		   B.veneer_matchinh,
		   B.veneer_matphu,
		   B.veneer_dan_canh,
		   C.loaihang AS MC,
		   D.loaihang AS MP,
		   E.loaihang AS DC
	INTO #TONGHOP_CHITIET
	FROM tr_dondathang_chitiet A
		 INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_govan B ON A.masp = B.masp
		 LEFT JOIN tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer C on B.veneer_matchinh = C.id
		 LEFT JOIN tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer D on B.veneer_matphu = D.id
		 LEFT JOIN tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer E on B.veneer_dan_canh = E.id
		 LEFT JOIN tr_sanpham F On B.masp = F.masp
	WHERE maddh IN (SELECT LTRIM (RTRIM ([VALUE])) FROM dbo.fn_Split (@maddh, ','))
		 --AND (COALESCE(B.nguyenlieu, '') NOT IN ('', '0') 
			--OR B.veneer_matchinh IS NOT NULL 
			--OR B.veneer_matphu IS NOT NULL 
			--OR B.veneer_dan_canh IS NOT NULL
		 --)
		  AND A.active = 1
		  AND B.mact <> '000'
		  AND B.dayy_tc > 0
		  AND A.chitiet LIKE 'W%'

	SELECT A.*,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.dai_tc > 0 AND A.dai_tc <= 999 THEN N'Ngắn'
			WHEN A.dai_tc >= 1000 AND A.dai_tc <= 1599 THEN N'Trung'
			WHEN A.dai_tc >= 1600 THEN N'Dài'
		END AS loaichitiet
	FROM #TONGHOP_CHITIET A

	DROP TABLE #TONGHOP_CHITIET;

END



","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.fn_split","dbo.tr_baogia_chiphi_veneer","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
